sqlMap.select: SELECT B.theme_id AS themeid, B.theme_name AS themename, B.theme_content AS themecontent, A.theme_used AS themeused, A.theme_default AS themedefault FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_THEME B ON A.theme_id = B.theme_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.theme_id = #themeId#

SELECT B.theme_id AS themeid, B.frame_id AS frameid, B.frame_name AS framename, A.frame_used AS frameused, A.frame_default AS framedefault FROM TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_FRAME B ON A.theme_id = B.theme_id AND A.frame_id = B.frame_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.theme_id = #themeId#

SELECT A.menu_id AS menuid, C.menu_name AS menuname, A.menu_used AS menuused, B.menu_Type AS menutype, A.company_lang AS companylang, B.menu_url AS menuurl, B.icon_url AS iconurl, CASE WHEN A.company_order IS NULL THEN B.default_order ELSE A.company_order END AS defaultorder FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU B ON A.menu_id = B.menu_id JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME C ON A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id AND A.company_id = C.company_id AND A.menu_id = C.menu_id AND A.company_lang = C.menu_lang WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# ORDER BY defaultorder

SELECT A.menu_id AS menuid, B.menu_type AS menutype, C.menu_name AS menuname, A.menu_used AS menuused, A.company_lang AS companylang, B.menu_url AS menuurl, B.icon_url AS iconurl, CASE WHEN A.company_order IS NULL THEN B.default_order ELSE A.company_order END AS defaultorder FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU B ON A.menu_id = B.menu_id JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME C ON A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id AND A.company_id = C.company_id AND A.menu_id = C.menu_id AND A.company_lang = C.menu_lang WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.menu_id = #menuId#

SELECT A.menu_lang AS menulang, A.menu_name AS menuname FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.menu_id = B.menu_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.menu_id = #menuId# ORDER BY CASE A.menu_lang WHEN B.company_lang THEN 1 ELSE 2 END

SELECT menu_id AS menuid, user_id AS userid, CASE WHEN user_type = 1 THEN (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND cn = user_id) ELSE '' END AS username, CASE WHEN user_type = 1 THEN (SELECT description FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND cn = user_id) ELSE (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND cn = user_id) END AS userdeptname, user_type AS usertype, access_yn AS accessyn FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND menu_id = #menuId# AND access_yn = #accessType# ORDER BY user_type
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP SET theme_used = #themeUsed#, theme_default = #themeDefault# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND theme_id = #themeId#
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP SET frame_used = #frameUsed#, frame_default = #frameDefault# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND theme_id = #themeId# AND frame_id = #frameId#

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU B ON A.menu_id = B.menu_id SET A.menu_used = #menuUsed#, B.menu_url = #menuUrl#, B.icon_url = #iconUrl# WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.menu_id = #menuId#

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME (menu_id, menu_lang, menu_name, company_id, tenant_id) VALUES (#menuId#, #menuLang#, #menuName#, #companyId#, #tenantId#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE tenant_id = #tenantId#, company_id = #companyId#, menu_id = #menuId#, menu_lang = #menuLang#, menu_name = #menuName#
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP SET portlet_used = #portletUsed# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND menu_id = #menuId#

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH (menu_id, user_id, user_type, access_yn, company_id, tenant_id) VALUES (#menuId#, #userId#, #userType#, #accessYN#, #companyId#, #tenantId#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE tenant_id = #tenantId#, company_id = #companyId#, menu_id = #menuId#, user_id = #userId#, access_yn = #accessYN#
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP SET company_order = #companyOrder# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND menu_id = #menuId#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT AUTO_INCREMENT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME = "TBL_PORTAL_MENU";
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU (menu_url, menu_type, icon_url) VALUES (#menuUrl#, #menuType#, #iconUrl#)

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP (menu_id, menu_used, company_lang, company_order, company_id, tenant_id) VALUES (#menuId#, #menuUsed#, #companyLang#, (SELECT MAX(company_order) + 1 FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#), #companyId#, #tenantId#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND menu_id = #menuId#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_NAME WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND menu_id = #menuId#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_AUTH WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND menu_id = #menuId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.boardid as id, A.parentboardid as parent, A.boardname as boardname1, A.boardname2 as boardname2, A.treevieworder as sort, B.parentboardid as topParent, A.boardcolor, IFNULL(A.gubun, -1) as gubun FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO A LEFT JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO B ON A.parentboardid = B.boardid WHERE
A.parentboardid = #parentBoardId#
A.boardtreepath LIKE CONCAT('%', #parentBoardId#, '%')
AND (A.companyid = #companyId# OR A.companyid IS NULL) AND A.tenant_id = #tenantId# ORDER BY A.treevieworder;
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT AUTO_INCREMENT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME = "TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET";
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET (menu_id, portlet_url, portlet_type, default_order) VALUES (#menuId#, #connectionUrl#, 'A', (SELECT MAX(A.portlet_order) + 1 FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP A WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId#))

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP (company_id, tenant_id, portlet_id, menu_id, portlet_category, connection_url, portlet_used, portlet_order, board_id) VALUES (#companyId#, #tenantId#, #portletId#, #menuId#, #portletCategory#, #connectionUrl#, #portletUsed#, (SELECT MAX(portlet_order) + 1 FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP A WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#), #boardId#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME SET menu_id = #menuId#, portlet_name = #portletName# WHERE portlet_id = #portletId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND portlet_lang = #portletLang#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (portlet_id, menu_id, portlet_lang, tenant_id, company_id, portlet_name) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, #portletLang#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #portletName#)
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET B ON A.portlet_id = B.portlet_id SET A.menu_id = #menuId#, A.portlet_used = #portletUsed#
,B.portlet_url = #connectionUrl# ,A.connection_url = #connectionUrl# ,B.menu_id = #menuId#
,A.board_id = #boardId#
WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.portlet_id = #portletId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND portlet_id = #portletId#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND portlet_id = #portletId#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET WHERE portlet_id = #portletId# AND menu_id = #menuId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP SET portlet_order = #portletOrder# WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND portlet_id = #portletId#

update.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_LOGO (company_id, tenant_id, logo_type, logo_url) VALUES (#companyId#, #tenantId#, #logoType#, #logoUrl#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE logo_url = #logoUrl#
INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_LOGO (company_id, tenant_id, logo_type, logo_url) VALUES (#tenantId#, #tenantId#, #logoType#, #logoUrl#) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE logo_url = #logoUrl#

sqlMap.select: SELECT logo_url as logourl, logo_type as logotype FROM TBL_PORTAL_LOGO WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
SELECT tenant_id FROM TBL_TENANT_SERVERNAME WHERE server_name = #serverName#
SELECT portlet_id FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMP WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND menu_id = #menuId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU_USER WHERE menu_id = #menuId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_USER WHERE portlet_id = #portletId# AND menu_id = #menuId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_portal_theme_comp SET theme_default = CASE WHEN theme_id = #themeId# THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, theme_used = CASE WHEN theme_id = #themeId# THEN 1 ELSE theme_used END WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP SET theme_default = CASE WHEN theme_id = #themeId# THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_LOGO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND logo_type = #logoType#
AND company_id = #tenantId#
AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP A, TBL_PORTAL_MENU B SET A.company_order = B.default_order WHERE A.menu_id = B.menu_id AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER SET used_theme = (SELECT theme_id FROM tbl_portal_theme_comp WHERE theme_default = 1 AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#), used_frame = (SELECT frame_id FROM tbl_portal_frame_comp WHERE frame_default = 1 AND company_id = #companyId# AND theme_id = (SELECT theme_id FROM tbl_portal_theme_comp WHERE theme_default = 1 AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#)) WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND used_theme = #themeId#;

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER SET used_frame = (SELECT frame_id FROM tbl_portal_frame_comp WHERE frame_default = 1 AND theme_id = #themeId# AND company_id = #companyId#) WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND used_theme = #themeId#;
sqlMap.select: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE , URL FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND IMAGEPATH like '%slideImagePortlet%' ORDER BY SN
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE ( SLIDERID, SLIDERNAME, SLIDERNAME2, FILENAME, IMAGEPATH, REGUSERID, REGDATE, COMPANYID, ISUSE, SN, TENANT_ID, URL ) VALUES ( #slideId#, 'slideImagePotlet', 'slideImagePotlet', #fileName#, #slideImagePath#, #regUserId#, #regDate#, #companyId#, 1, #count# + 1, #tenantID#, #imageUrl# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE , URL FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND SLIDERID = #slideId# ORDER BY SN
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(SN), 0) FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND IMAGEPATH like '%slideImagePortlet%'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE SET IMAGEPATH = #slideImagePath#, REGUSERID = #regUserId#, REGDATE = #regDate#, FILENAME = #fileName#, URL = #imageUrl# WHERE COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND SLIDERID = #slideId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND SLIDERID = #slideId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE SET sn = #order# WHERE COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND SLIDERID = #slideId#
